dashboard.label: T1071.001 — HTTP Beaconing (Sliver)
dashboard.description: HTTP/HTTPS C2 beaconing detection. Identifies (src, dest) pairs with consistent inter-connection intervals over a window.

search.query: `http_beacon_jitter` | where (like(src, "$src_filter$") OR "$src_filter$"="*") | where (like(dest, "$dest_filter$") OR "$dest_filter$"="*") | stats count

`http_beacon_jitter` | where (like(src, "$src_filter$") OR "$src_filter$"="*") | where (like(dest, "$dest_filter$") OR "$dest_filter$"="*") | eval first_seen=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval avg_interval_s=round(avg_interval, 1) | eval cov=round(coefficient_of_variation, 3) | eval duration_min=round(duration_seconds/60, 1) | sort -connection_count | table first_seen, src, dest, dest_ports, connection_count, avg_interval_s, cov, duration_min

panel.title: Connection timing — selected pair (set src/dest above)

search.query: index=zeek (sourcetype=zeek:conn OR sourcetype=zeek:http) | where like(src, "$src_filter$") AND like(coalesce('host', dest, 'id.resp_h'), "$dest_filter$") | timechart span=1m count

html.h3: T1071.001 — Application Layer Protocol: Web Protocols
html.p: C2 frameworks (Sliver, Cobalt Strike, Empire, Mythic) call home on a configured cadence. The implant timing is the strongest network signal — humans don't browse on a metronome. We compute the coefficient of variation of inter-connection intervals per (src, dest); a low CoV means unnaturally regular timing.
Default threshold is CoV ≤ 0.1 — catches default Sliver, default Cobalt Strike, and unjittered Empire. Raise to 0.2–0.3 to catch jittered beacons at the cost of more FPs from health checks.
